Title: Weber, Hans
Subject Area: ancient|Ancient Greek (culture or style)|architecture (object genre)|Classical|Levantine (culture or style)|Near Eastern (Early Western World)|religious buildings|sculpture (visual works)
Overview: Specialist in classical Greek sculpture and ancient Near Eastern temple architecture. Weber worked at Olympia excavation in Greece 1938-1944. His participation during this years was a mark of his complicity with the Nazi government. After the war, he resumed his academic training, and wrote his habilitationsschrift at the University of Kiel in 1956. He was the second Director of the deutsches archäologisches Institut Istanbul (German Archaeological Institute, or DAI) between 1961-1968. In 1968 he accepted a call to be Professor at the University of Freiburg (i. Br.) 1968-1980.
Selected Bibliography: "Zeitbestimmung der Florentiner Niobiden." JdI 75 (1960): 112 ff.; "Ein spätgriechische Jünglingsstatue" Olympiabericht V 1941/42 (1956): 128 ff.
Sources: Archäologenbildnisse: Porträts und Kurzbiographien von Klassichen Archäologen deutscher Sprache. Reinhard Lullies, ed. Mainz am Rhein: Verlag Philipp von Zabern, 1988: 317-318.
